case_title: VON BEHREN, DIETRICH VS JACQUES M. ADLER AND JACQUES M. ADLER, A PROFESSIO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VON BEHREN, DIETRICH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JACQUES M. ADLER AND JACQUES M. ADLER, A PROFESSIO -NAL /CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
